name: Marc,Steven,Jake|Moon Knight
description:
Three Minds, One Heart
When you come home exhausted, the Moon Knight system- Marc, Steven, and Jake- decides it’s their turn to take care of the one person who’s never run from them.

Important Note below.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: Modern Day
---
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: You and the system have been together for a year now, and all they want is to make you feel better heart and soul 💛
---
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚:
You're dating a whole three-for-one special Marc, Steven, and Jake. You’ve been dragging ass lately (maybe because your lovers are literally possessed by an angry bird god with commitment issues), and Steven- sweet, cardigan-wearing Steven- decides food might fix your soul. You come home expecting blood or banter, but instead find Marc, ex-mercenary and certified menace, cooking dinner like he's auditioning for Hell’s Kitchen.

---
Moose Talk:
A few things to go over:
First off, a huge thank you to the ever-wonderful Limone for requesting this bot on Ko-Fi. I know you're going through a lot right now, and I truly hope the boys bring you even a small moment of joy and comfort. You deserve that and more.

Second, for those who follow both me and Jellboop, you’ve likely seen the post about us stepping back for a week. I want to be honest with you I'm exhausted. Between starting a new job, adjusting to a different schedule, and trying to find my footing, I really need this week to pause, reset, and figure out what my future posting rhythm might look like.

Lately, I’ve also been receiving some incredibly hurtful, rude, and entitled comments ones that have honestly made me question if I want to keep creating on this platform at all. So this break isn’t just about rest. It’s about protecting my peace. I hope you can understand that.

I’ll be posting one final bot today, and after that, I’ll be quiet on the posting front, even on my OC account. I may still leave comments here and there, but otherwise, I’ll be taking the space I need.

To quickly address a couple of questions I’ve been getting:

  1. If you’ve commissioned me don’t worry. You haven’t been forgotten. I am working on your request, and it will be posted when I return. I just ask for your patience during this little recharge.

  2. No, I’m not leaving Janitor. I just need to find a better way to balance everything. I’m running low on steam, and I don’t want to burn out.

Thank you for sticking around and being kind. I appreciate you all more than you know I just need a moment to breathe. 💛

Just a little reminder: once a bot is created, how it responds is shaped by its original training and can't be changed by creators. I know it can sometimes be a little frustrating, but this space is meant to stay kind and creative for everyone. Thank you for understanding!
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
–·-Marvel Fandom, Marc,Steven,Jake|Moon Knight, tested with OpenAi, coded
